docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY KING, GRACE HUNT, ASKARI AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & AUTO #3441 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-07-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KING, GRACE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED MAY-08-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & AUTO #3441
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) GREG BENNER FILED BY DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & AUTO #3441

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-07-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-07-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS GRACE KING AND ASKARI HUNT ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & AUTO #3441 (GREG BENNER) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-07-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING, GRACE HUNT, ASKARI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOSCALITO TIRE & AUTO #3441 PLAINTIFFS AND DEFENDANT, ACTING THROUGH MANAGER GREG BENNER, REACHED A FULL SETTLEMENT. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFFS $2500 IN FULL SETTLEMENT OF ALL CLAIMS SET FORTH IN CLAIM FILED MAY 7, 2025. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
